name: Condition
description: Add conditional logic

name: Delay
description: Wait for a period

name: Approval Required
description: Require manual approval

name: Loop
description: Repeat steps until a condition is met

name: Merge Branches
description: Merge multiple parallel branches into one

name: Fork
description: Split flow into parallel branches

name: Wait for Event
description: Pause flow until a specific event occurs

name: Counter
description: Increment a counter and check threshold

name: Error Handler
description: Handle errors in the workflow gracefully

name: Retry
description: Retry a failed step automatically

name: Timeout
description: Fail step if not completed within time limit

name: Switch / Case
description: Branch on multiple possible values

name: All Must Complete
description: Wait for all parallel branches to finish

name: Any Must Complete
description: Continue when any one branch finishes

name: Priority Check
description: Branch based on case priority level

name: Date Check
description: Branch based on date or time condition

name: Role Check
description: Branch based on the user's role

name: Status Check
description: Branch based on the current status value

name: Amount Threshold
description: Branch if a monetary value exceeds a threshold

name: Notification Gate
description: Pause until notification is acknowledged

name: Sub-workflow
description: Invoke another workflow as a nested step

name: Skip If
description: Skip subsequent steps based on a condition

name: Parallel Execute
description: Execute multiple steps simultaneously

name: Sequential Gate
description: Ensure steps run strictly in order

name: End Flow
description: Terminate the workflow immediately
